title: SISTERS TRANSPORTATION AND RIDE SHARE - 211info
text: SISTERS TRANSPORTATION AND RIDESHARE SISTERS TRANSPORTATION AND RIDE SHARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides non-emergency medical transportation for individuals going to medical, dental, lab, testing, or physical therapy appointments in Sisters, Bend, or Redmond. Individuals may request a ride to a pharmacy within the Sisters city limits. Riders must be able to get in and out of vehicles with little assistance from drivers. Eligibility: Individuals who are unable to drive and who do not require use of a wheelchair or scooter Hours: Phone hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-3pm Rides: Varies by service Email (541) 904-5545 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Dispatch (541) 904-5545 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: None, donations accepted but must be via check DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Sisters School District (zip code 97759) Services: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
